content.content: Short form content creator and TikTok personality who rose to fame as the platform's "spider girl." She frequently performed with her pet tarantula and has amassed more than 650,000 fans. Her oldest archived TikTok was captioned "I got tired :\." In late 2019, she recorded a hand it over video based off of the viral trend. She can be seen with her spider on her face in some videos. Others feature her other pets, which include a cat and tortoise. She was born in North Carolina. She created a video set toMac DeMarco's "On the Square."
